vcs.merge_strategy: merge to main at P9 hard stop after review
vcs.commit_cadence: one commit per phase, subject prefixed with phase id (e.g., 'P0: characterization tests')

must_read_first: context.json - scope, constraints, and success criteria
analysis.json - affected surfaces, risks, and blast radius
forbidden_files: src/scanner/scanner.ts (do not change the public contract)
src/cache/incremental-cache.ts (unless the scanner contract forces a follow-up fix)
src/types/types.ts (unless a regression requires a type-only follow-up)
success_criteria: Characterization tests lock existing behavior before extraction
Parallel and sequential paths stay in parity
No hidden global mutation remains during a scan

task_queue.title: Extract scanner pattern, dedupe, and comment utilities
Extract per-file runner and unify fallback paths
Move progress and cache bookkeeping into runtime helpers

execution_notes.plan_type_rationale: User explicitly requested phased plan mode for the scanner modularization refactor.

hard_stops.description: Phase 9 final parity and cleanup checkpoint
hard_stops.approval_basis: User verified CLI end-to-end on LLOYD (94 elements, 8 classes, 26 methods, 60 functions). P0/P8 spec-lock guards green. Baseline 132 pass / 5 fail matches pre-refactor.

history.details: Workorder created in phased mode after user override from strict to phased.
Created working branch wo/scanner-module-extraction and worktree at ../coderef-core-scanner-refactor. All phase work will commit to the branch; merge to main after P9 hard stop review.

Phases P0-P9 executed across 11 commits (ecbd872..f853246). scanner.ts reduced 1618->535 LoC (66%) across 7 focused modules: scanner-patterns, scanner-dedupe, scanner-comments, scanner-file-discovery, scanner-file-runner, scanner-runtime, plus the orchestrator. Two P0 spec-lock guards (customPatterns no-leak, parallel==sequential dedupe parity) turned green after P6 as intended. P8 parity verification subsumed into P9 regression commit. Test baseline 132 pass / 5 fail matches pre-refactor baseline documented in P0-BASELINE.md.

After P9 commit, ran coderef-scan CLI against LLOYD codebase: detected 94 elements (8 classes, 26 methods, 60 functions). Confirms public scanCurrentElements() contract and worker-thread Scanner import path remain intact end-to-end.

Two post-P9 fixes caught only by LLOYD CLI verification: (1) scanner.ts missing export { Scanner } re-export line, broke scanner-worker.ts import chain in parallel mode; (2) plugins/types.ts JSDoc example contained literal */ sequence inside comment, broke TSC parse. Both fixed; committed in close commit.

Closed via /close-workorder skill. All 10 phases complete, hard stop P9 approved, CLI verified on external project. Branch wo/scanner-module-extraction left ready-to-merge on origin; user will merge to main in separate step.
